prestazioni: Full hybrid turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (846507-5002S) paired with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 (179388) secondary turbo for sequential compound setup on the **DAZA 2.5L TFSI (CZGB)** engine, utilizing a Pierburg CWA 50 high-pressure fuel pump (7.01793.03.0) and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (170058-01-1612) for 650+ HP on E85

Full billet aluminum short block build with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (MAHLE 2618 alloy, 8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (CWL-2.5T-6300), and a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (92501-1) with ACL Race Series main and rod bearings (5M905HX & 4B905HX), paired with an upgraded Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (3000 955 030) and lightweight flywheel (3000 955 031)

Custom Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel and compound turbo mapping, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport 0261S02050 high-pressure fuel sensor and AEM X-Series wideband controllers (30-0334) for real-time AFR targeting, alongside a CSF Racing 8-passenger intercooler (8213) and custom 3.5" charge piping with Tial Q 50mm BOV (15710) and Turbosmart Race Port 44mm wastegate (1440)
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-RS3 (8V) kit with extended fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon Carbon (AUD-RS3-14-HOOD-CF)

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV 2-way adjustable, part #OHL-RT-4-120-A) with custom valving for the RS3 8V chassis, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars (385 250 02 & 385 251 02) and Whiteline adjustable end links (KCA416 & KCA417)

Full custom interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (RS-GT II, part #38906005) wrapped in Alcantara (Alcantara Milano, color code 1500) with red contrast stitching, paired with a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8V-specific bolt-in design) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (0111201211) with integrated quick-release hub
